title: Foxy’s Cheating Game
description: The Foxy Pirates force the Straw Hats toward the decisive round, where Luffy has to defend his crew directly.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. The Foxy Pirates force the Straw Hats toward the decisive round, where Luffy has to defend his crew directly.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Business1!! Use the big pans and...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He is doing the bending exercise and...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He doesn't see any of this!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Their target is the ball, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: What kind of burger will he become!?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: for third class material like you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey!! Big Bang, stop the pans!!!

summary: The Foxy Pirates force the Straw Hats toward the decisive round, where Luffy has to defend his crew directly.
